steps.title: Use the correspondence
steps.content: The congruent triangles are listed so that $A$ corresponds to $P$, $B$ corresponds to $Q$, and $C$ corresponds to $R$.

steps.title: Match the angle measures
steps.content: Corresponding angles in congruent triangles are equal, so angle $P$ has the same measure as angle $A$. $$50^\circ$$ The answer is B.
